name: Cocktail Chemistry
notes: Science-based cocktail education, massive following, DIY cocktail builds. Strong fit for My Bar ingredient search feature.

name: How To Drink
notes: Greg Titian, classic cocktail education, history-focused. Recipes + history angle fits Spirit Library's catalog.

name: Jim and Tonics
notes: Popular casual cocktail creator. Recipe sharing and menu curation features are perfect pitch.

name: The Ginger Bartender
notes: UK-based bartender with large following. Professional bar content aligns with share menus feature.

name: Andy Levine Drinks
notes: Creative cocktail builds, strong visual content. Custom cocktail creation feature pitch.

name: Imbibe Magazine
notes: Premier cocktail/spirits magazine. App feature coverage or partnership for content.

name: PUNCH Drink
notes: Leading cocktail/spirits media. Editorial partnership or app review angle.

name: Difford's Guide
notes: World's largest cocktail database/guide. Cross-promotion or content partnership opportunity.

name: Liquor.com
notes: Major spirits/cocktail digital media. App feature or recipe collaboration.

name: Tales of the Cocktail Foundation
notes: Annual New Orleans cocktail festival, industry hub. Event partnership or official app of TOTCF.

name: Wine Enthusiast
notes: Major drinks media with cocktail section. App review or content partnership.

name: Food & Wine
notes: Major food media with strong cocktail content. App feature or partnership. Shopping cart angle (buy ingredients).

name: The Spruce Eats
notes: Major recipe site with cocktail section. Ingredient search feature is directly relevant.

name: Bon Appétit
notes: Premium food/drink media. Custom cocktail + share menus features align with their DIY content.

name: High Proof Preacher
notes: Bourbon/whiskey focused influencer. My Bar + flavor search features are a perfect fit.

name: Steve the Bartender
notes: Professional bartender with tutorial-style content. Share menus and professional bar use case.

name: The Boozy Oyster
notes: TikTok cocktail creator with strong visual content. Custom cocktail creation feature pitch.

name: Cocktail Molly
notes: TikTok cocktail creator. Custom cocktails + ingredient search angle.

name: Kara Elder Eats
notes: Food/drink influencer. Occasion-based cocktail search + share menus features.

name: Nicolas Palazzi (PM Spirits)
notes: Craft spirits importer and industry figure. Premium spirits discovery via My Bar feature.

name: Cocktail Lab
notes: Experimental cocktail content. Custom cocktail creation feature is the core pitch.

name: Behind the Bar
notes: Professional bartending content. Professional bar menu sharing feature.

name: The Cocktail Project
notes: Recipe-focused cocktail content. Full app feature suite pitch.

name: Mixology Monday
notes: Cocktail community/challenge account. Custom cocktail sharing + community features.

name: Spritz Society
notes: RTD wine-based cocktail brand. Recipe partnership + ingredient search for spritzes.
